issue_title: Fix popup width when embedded in page
issue_body_preview:
### Current Problem

Looks like the "popup embedded in the YouTube sidebar" was moved to an `<iframe>` in #1322.

This broke a CSS selector which was there to remove the fixed `width` from the popup when it's embedded in the page:

https://github.com/ajayyy/SponsorBlock/blob/780ea4a9d0b12762d1
test_description_zh: 在 YouTube 视频页面中，打开 SponsorBlock 嵌入在页面侧边栏中的弹出面板（popup），观察其宽度是否自适应容器大小，而非使用固定宽度。
expected_result_zh: 当 SponsorBlock 弹出面板嵌入在 YouTube 侧边栏中时，面板宽度应自适应父容器宽度，不应出现固定宽度导致的溢出、截断或异常窄的显示问题。
